name: OK Computer
overview: The year is 2031. In a New India - of towering smart holograms and drone superhighways - hard-boiled Cyber Crime detective Saajan Kundu is called out of retirement when a self-driving taxi is hacked and ordered to kill an anonymous human victim. Saajan begrudgingly joins forces with estranged partner Laxmi Suri, a whip-smart AI scientist, to comb the modern backwaters of Goa for the killer.

trailers.title: Hotstar Specials OK Computer | Trailer I Vijay Varma, Radhika Apte, Jackie Shroff, Anand Gandhi
